title: Assembly Assembled | Extras
description: This datapack adds bridge information and rebalancing for the mods within the Assembly Assembled Datapack
body: This datapack adds compatibility between several mods in the modpack Assembly Assembled. Specifically, it adds custom Puffish skills skilltrees, and NutritionZ data, which changes the values for low nutrition and high nutrition. While this pack can be used stand-alone with NutritionZ, PuffishSkill mods, and Puffish attributes, it's intended to be used with others as well.
